A

ASCENDING - Static variable in class com.datajets.OrderDirection
A sort order to define ascending alphabetical or numerical data.
addField(String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds a single field to the field list.
addField(String, String) - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Adds a field to the table definition.
andHaving(int, Comparison, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds a HAVING clause to a SELECT statement with AND.

Adds a HAVING clause to a SELECT statement with AND.

C

Comparison - class com.datajets.Comparison.
Used as a parameter for several SqlBuilder methods.
ConnectionException - exception com.datajets.ConnectionException.
Thrown when a DataJet cannot connect to the specified database.
ConnectionException(String) - Constructor for class com.datajets.ConnectionException
Class constructor specifying the message to add.
ConnectionGenerator - interface com.datajets.ConnectionGenerator.
Used to manage java.sql.Connection objects required by DataJets.
clone() - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Returns a clone of the DataJet.
closeConnection(Connection) - Method in interface com.datajets.ConnectionGenerator
Frees resources after DataJet is finished using the Connection.
closeConnection(Connection) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Closes the connection object.
com.datajets - package com.datajets
Provides a framework for creating DataJets, database-aware classes that contain create, read, update and delete functionality.
createConnection() - Method in interface com.datajets.ConnectionGenerator
Establishes the connection to be used by a DataJet.
createConnection() - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Creates a new java.sql.Connection object based on the connection information supplied to the DataJet.
createSqlBuilder() - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Creates a SqlBuilder based on the table and fields specified by DataJet.
createSqlBuilder() - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Creates a SqlBuilder object based on the TableDefinition.
createTable(boolean) - Method in interface com.datajets.Definable
Creates a physical database table to correspond to the DataJet.
createTable(ConnectionGenerator, boolean) - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Creates a physical database table based on the TableDefinition.
createTable(String, String, boolean) - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Creates a physical database table based on the TableDefinition.
createTable(Connection, boolean) - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Creates a physical database table based on the TableDefinition.
createTableStatement() - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Creates a CREATE TABLE statement based on supplied values.

D

DESCENDING - Static variable in class com.datajets.OrderDirection
A sort order to define descending alphabetical or numerical data.
DataJet - class com.datajets.DataJet.
The base class for all DataJets.
DataJet(int, JetSet) - Constructor for class com.datajets.DataJet
Constructor that sets the id for the DataJet to use.
DataJet(JetSet) - Constructor for class com.datajets.DataJet
Constructor.
DataJetException - exception com.datajets.DataJetException.
Thrown when a DataJet attempts to access a method before it has been initialized.
DataJetException(String) - Constructor for class com.datajets.DataJetException
Class constructor specifying the message to add.
Datum - class com.datajets.Datum.
A single piece of data retrieved from or to be stored in a database table.
Datum(Object) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains any Object.
Datum(int) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains an int.
Datum(boolean) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains a boolean.
Datum(short) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains a boolean.
Datum(long) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains a long.
Datum(float) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains a float.
Datum(double) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains a double.
Datum(byte) - Constructor for class com.datajets.Datum
Creates a Datum object that contains a byte.
Definable - interface com.datajets.Definable.
Specifies that a DataJet will expose methods to create a physical table corresponding to the DataJet.
deleteByIdStatement(int) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Creates an DELETE statement based on supplied values.
deleteStatement() - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Creates an DELETE statement based on supplied values.

E

EQUAL - Static variable in class com.datajets.Comparison
A comparison representing equality.
encode(String) - Static method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Modifies a string so it will be processed as a complete string within SQL.

F

fillDataJet(DataJet, Object[]) - Static method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Sets the field values of the supplied DataJet.

G

GREATER_THAN - Static variable in class com.datajets.Comparison
A comparison representing greater than.
GREATER_THAN_EQUAL - Static variable in class com.datajets.Comparison
A comparison representing greater than or equal.
GenericDataJet - class com.datajets.GenericDataJet.
A concrete entension of DataJet that implements Storable and Removable and can be used by composition or inheritance.
GenericDataJet(int, JetSet) - Constructor for class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Constructor that sets the id for GenericDataJet to use.
GenericDataJet(JetSet) - Constructor for class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Constructor that accepts a JetSet.
getConnectionGenerator() - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Returns the ConnectionGenerator that was supplied to the DataJet.
getConnectionString() - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Returns the connection string that was supplied to the DataJet.
getDriver() - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Returns the driver name that was supplied to the DataJet.
getFieldList() - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Returns the field names for the DataJet.
getFieldList() - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Returns array of strings representing field names already established.
getFieldName(int) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Returns the name of the field indentified by fieldIndex.
getFieldName(int) - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Returns the name of the field located at the specified index.
getFieldNames() - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Returns the names of all field specified.
getFieldProperties(int) - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Returns the properties for the field located at the specified index.
getFieldProperties() - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Returns the properties of all field specified.
getFieldValue(int) - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Returns the value of a field.
getFieldValue(int) - Method in class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Returns the value of a field.
getFieldValueAsObject(int) - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Returns the value of a field.
getFieldValueAsObject(int) - Method in class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Returns the value of a field.
getId() - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Returns the value of the identity field for the currently-loaded DataJet.
getTable() - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Returns the table name for the DataJet.
getTable() - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Returns string representing table name already established.
getTable() - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Returns the name of the table.
groupBy(int) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds a GROUP BY clause to a SELECT statement.
groupBy(String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds a GROUP BY clause to a SELECT statement.

I

INNER - Static variable in class com.datajets.JoinType
A join type to define an inner join.
indexOf(String) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Finds the index of a field that matches fieldName.
indexOf(String) - Method in class com.datajets.TableDefinition
Finds the index of the field specified.
insertStatement() - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Creates a INSERT statement based on supplied values.
isBoolean() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a Boolean or not.
isByte() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a Byte or not.
isDate() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a Date or not.
isDouble() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a Double or not.
isFloat() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a Float or not.
isInt() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is an Integer or not.
isLong() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a Long or not.
isNull() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is null or not.
isShort() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a Short or not.
isString() - Method in class com.datajets.Datum
Tests whether the internal object is a String or not.

J

JetSet - class com.datajets.JetSet.
The class for initializing DataJet objects and methods.

Constructor.
JetSet(ConnectionGenerator, String, String[]) - Constructor for class com.datajets.JetSet
Constructor.

Constructor.
JetSet(ConnectionGenerator, TableDefinition) - Constructor for class com.datajets.JetSet
Constructor.
JoinType - class com.datajets.JoinType.
Used as a parameter in join methods in SqlBuilder.
join(String, String, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds an INNER JOIN clause to an SQL statement.
join(String, String, Comparison, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds an INNER JOIN clause to an SQL statement.
join(String, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds an INNER JOIN clause to an SQL statement.
join(JoinType, String, String, Comparison, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds a JOIN clause to an SQL statement.
join(JoinType, String, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Adds a JOIN clause to an SQL statement.

L

LEFT_OUTER - Static variable in class com.datajets.JoinType
A join type to define a left outer join.
LESS_THAN - Static variable in class com.datajets.Comparison
A comparison representing less than.
LESS_THAN_EQUAL - Static variable in class com.datajets.Comparison
A comparison representing less than or equal.
LIKE - Static variable in class com.datajets.Comparison
A comparison representing similarity.
load(int, DataJet, JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Loads a single record from the database to the supplied DataJet.
loadAllJets(JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Loads an array of all GenericDataJets from the database.
loadJet(int, JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Loads a GenericDataJet with identity field equal to id from the database.
loadMultiple(String, DataJet[], JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Loads multiple records from the database to the supplied array of DataJet objects.
loadMultiple(SqlBuilder, DataJet[], JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Loads multiple records from the database to the supplied array of DataJet objects.
loadMultiple(SqlBuilder, DataJet, JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Loads multiple records from the database to the supplied array of DataJet objects.
loadMultiple(String, DataJet, JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Loads multiple records from the database to the supplied array of DataJet objects.
loadSql(int, JetSet) - Static method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Returns SQL statement the DataJet will use to load a record.

NOT_EQUAL - Static variable in class com.datajets.Comparison
A comparison representing inequality.

Adds an ORDER BY clause to a SELECT statement with direction as the direction.

orderByDescending(String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder

P

prependField(int, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Prepends the field name with a table name.

R

RIGHT_OUTER - Static variable in class com.datajets.JoinType
A join type to define a left outer join.
Removable - interface com.datajets.Removable.
Specifies that a DataJet will expose a public remove method.
recordExists() - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Tests whether the currently-loaded DataJet has a corresponding record in the database.
remove(Connection) - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Removes the current DataJet from the database.
remove() - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Removes the current DataJet from the database.
remove() - Method in class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Removes the current GenericDataJet from the database.
remove() - Method in interface com.datajets.Removable
Removes the record that is currently loaded by the DataJet object.
removeSql() - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Returns SQL statement the DataJet will use to remove a record.

S

SqlBuilder - class com.datajets.SqlBuilder.
Facilitates creation of SQL statements in an object-oriented manner.
SqlBuilder(String, String[], String[], int) - Constructor for class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Constructor that establishes table, fields, field properties and identity field.
SqlBuilder(String, String[], int) - Constructor for class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Constructor that establishes table, fields, and identity field.
SqlBuilder(String, String[], String) - Constructor for class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Constructor that establishes table, fields, and identity field.
SqlBuilder(String, String[]) - Constructor for class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Constructor that establishes table and fields.
SqlBuilder(String) - Constructor for class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Constructor that establishes table.
SqlBuilder() - Constructor for class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Constructor that does not establish table, fields or identity field.
Storable - interface com.datajets.Storable.
Specifies that a DataJet will expose a public store method.
selectByIdStatement(int) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Creates a SELECT statement based on supplied values.
selectStatement() - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Creates a SELECT statement based on supplied values.
setConnection(ConnectionGenerator) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Sets the connection information for the DataJet.
setConnection(String, String) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Sets the connection information for the DataJet.
setFieldList(String[]) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Sets the field names for the DataJet.
setFieldList(String[], int) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Establishes fields and identity field.
setFieldList(String[], String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Establishes fields and identity field.
setFieldList(String[]) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Establishes fields.
setFieldProperties(int, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets properties of a field for CREATE TABLE statements.

Sets the value of a field.

Sets the value of a field.

Sets the value of a field.

Sets the value of a field.
setFieldValue(int, Datum) - Method in class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Sets the value of a field.
setFieldValue(int, byte) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, double) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, float) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, long) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, short) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.

Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, Date) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, int) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder

setFieldValue(int, String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, Object) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValue(int, Datum) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements.
setFieldValueToNull(int) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Sets value of field for UPDATE and INSERT statements to NULL.
setTable(String, String[]) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Sets the table name and the field names for the DataJet.
setTable(TableDefinition) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Sets the table name and the field names for the DataJet using a TableDefinition object.
setTable(String) - Method in class com.datajets.JetSet
Sets the table name for the DataJet.
setTable(String) - Method in class com.datajets.SqlBuilder
Establishes table.
store(Connection) - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Stores the current DataJet in the database.
store() - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Stores the current DataJet in the database.
store() - Method in class com.datajets.GenericDataJet
Stores the current GenericDataJet in the database.
store() - Method in interface com.datajets.Storable
Stores the record that is currently loaded by the DataJet object.
storeSql() - Method in class com.datajets.DataJet
Returns SQL statement the DataJet will use to store a record.

T

TableDefinition - class com.datajets.TableDefinition.
Contains information about a physical database table.
